steps.title: Spot the image-to-metaphor connection
steps.content: The underlined portion presents a concrete natural event: wind shaking seed-pods. The speaker then transforms this into a metaphor for their mental state, as shown by “I am scattered like the hot shrivelled seeds”—the same motion applied to the speaker's inner turbulence.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice C fits the clue perfectly: it describes exactly how the underlined portion functions—as “an observation” the speaker “expands on to convey a sense of a turbulent interior state.” The other three either misattribute cause (A), oversimplify the dynamic (B), or introduce an unsupported theme (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
